name: COPPER ODYSSEY 2
short_description: The world of Copper Odyssey returns! You play as an Angel named Celeste who must touch 30 paintings to bring color back to them. This is a JRPG that takes place in a museum. Respect the craft and yourself by fighting against the living artworks who want to make you one of their own.
detailed_description:
In Copper Odyssey 2, you will be playing as Celeste, the little sister of Herman the Printmaking Angel. She has gotten a job outside of the print studio and into Nickel City. Her first day will be turning blank canvases into paintings. Go through the museum and do the best job you can. She’ll be able to make some friends along the way. Reveal the 30 paintings and you'll be done for the day.

This game uses JRPG combat to destroy enemies. There are many enemies who are beautiful artworks, they want to take Celeste to the Unicorn’s art studio…but she has a job to do.

This game, like the previous Copper Odyssey, is open-ended. You can handle things in any order you want, as long as you respect the craft!
